splash.body:
Let’s practice building some media plans!

Your account executive, Ryan Giordano, forwarded you an email from his media buyer. They want you to build a media plan for their Home Depot campaign.

You have two goals in this lab:

  1. Build a Slingshot media plan that matches the order details
  2. Use your Pandora media plan to fill out the third party media plan template
Great question. We've created some specific resources to help you with this lab. Let's organize these resources as systems and documents.

Salesforce TOPS Classroom. A sandbox version of Salesforce. You're free to explore, mess things up and get a good feel of Salesforce without screwing up any live orders. You should have a Home Depot opportunity assigned to you in the sandbox.

Slingshot TOPS Classroom. A sandbox version of Slingshot. We use this for media planning, pulling avails and trafficking orders. Show your Slingshot order to your TA during your check-in for feedback.

Client Email. Your account executive forwarded an email from the Home Depot media buyer. This email tells

  • Any negotiated rates
  • Total budget
  • Budget allocation
  • Demo + Geo Information

      • Third Party Template. Your media buyer wants you to send them a media plan using a third party template. You'll need to build a Pandora media plan in Slingshot first. Then, copy and paste the information in the appropriate fields. You up for the challenge?

      Rate Card. Use your channel's rate card to pull avails and rates for your media plan.

Click the link below to get your lab resources.

Lab Assets

Once you've completed your lab assignment, click the Continue button.
